description: editor.rs:23 emits a clippy warning 'empty_line_after_doc_comments' — an empty doc-comment line between the module-level doc comment and the use statement. Also line 86 doc comment says 'No unsafe, no unwrap()' but line 91 uses unwrap_or_else on Option, contradicting the doc comment's spirit.

evidence.snippet: empty_line_after_doc_comments at line 23; unwrap_or_else at line 91
